q: Transition elements are the metals that exist in the block between Groups _______.
Transition elements are in Groups _______ of the Periodic Table.
In the Periodic Table, the number of transition series are _______.
The 3d transition series contains elements having an atomic number from _______.
In the Periodic Table, the first element in first series 3d transition element is _______.
IUPAC defines transition elements are elements that have a/an _______ filled d sub shell.
The f-block lanthanide and actinide series are called the _______ transition elements.
The inner transition elements are _______ block elements.
The 5d transition elements in the Periodic Table is located in the _______ series.
In the periodic table, the third series _______ transition elements run from yttrium (39Y) through cadmium (48Cd).
The first row of the transition elements is in the _______ of the Periodic Table.
According to IUPAC, Zn, Cd, and Hg are not regarded as _______ elements.
For the 3d series transition elements, the nuclear charge _______ from scandium to copper.
For the 3d series transition elements, the atomic radii gradually _______ from scandium to copper.
All the transition elements in 3d series have quite similar _______.
The first ionisation energies (IE) of scandium to copper increase only slightly as the positive charge on the nucleus (atomic number) _______.
In 3d series transition elements, zinc has the _______ atomic size and ionisation energy.
The outermost orbital of 3d transition series is _______ orbital.
The 4s orbital is slightly _______ in energy than the 3d orbitals.
In atoms of the transition elements, the 4s orbital is normally filled and the rest of the electrons occupy the _______ orbitals.
The filling of the 3d orbitals generally obeys _______ rule/principle.
The complete electronic configuration of titanium (22Ti) can be described _______.
The essential electronic configuration of 29Cu is represented as _______.
The general essential electronic configuration of the transition elements is _______.
The electrons are always removed first from the _______ orbital in 3d transition elements.
The electronic configuration of the iron(II) ion (26Fe²⁺) is _______.
The electronic configuration of the chromium(III) ion (24Cr³⁺) is _______.
The general essential electronic configurations of ions of the 3d series transition elements is _______.
Zinc can form compounds in the _______ oxidation state only.
The most of 3d series transition elements are _______ in colour.
The 3d series transition metals are generally _______ conductors of electricity and heat.
The 3d series transition metals have _______ melting points and boiling points.
One cubic centimetre (1 cm³) cube of iron is _______ times heavier than a 1 cm³ cube of sodium.
In 3d series transition elements, the element with highest melting point is _______.
In 3d series transition elements, the element with lowest boiling point is _______.
In 3d series transition elements, the element with highest density is _______.
In 3d series transition elements, the element with lowest density is _______.
The most of transition elements usually form _______ compounds and ions.
The transition elements can be showed _______ oxidation states.
The _______ oxidation states are more stable at the beginning of the 3d series transition elements.
In the end of the 3d series transition elements, _______ oxidation states are more stable.
Iron (26Fe) is known to form oxidation states from _______.
The highest oxidation state of manganese (26Mn) is _______.
Except zinc, all other transition elements show a common oxidation state of _______.
Except scandium, all other transition elements show a common oxidation state of _______.
The ions of the highest oxidation states of 3d transition elements tend to be good _______ agent.
The ions with the lowest oxidation state of +2 in 3d transition elements are _______ agents.
Zn²⁺ are poor _______ agents.
Transition metals with highest oxidation states in compounds combine with highly _______ elements.
The colour of compounds of transition metals is due to the presence of _______ orbitals.
